sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58573" key="kolafasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολᾰφ-ασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sheathing</tr_>, Id.:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολᾰ´φ-αρχος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κακόσχολον ὄνομα</foreign>, Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κολεῖν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐλθεῖν</foreign>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
